# removeGraph(_:)

**Instance Method**

Removes a pathfinding graph from the list of graphs managed by the scene.

## Declaration

```swift
func removeGraph(_ name: String)
```

## Managing Pathfinding Graphs

- **graphs**: The list of pathfinding graph objects managed by the scene.

items.description: The list of pathfinding graph objects managed by the scene.
items.name: graphs
